name: Track 0: Shared Infrastructure
mission: Build the foundation that all other tracks depend on. First 2 hours: build. Rest of day: helpdesk.

name: Track 1: GIAS Audit Planning Pipeline
mission: Run the full UC1-UC9 audit planning pipeline against synthetic data and produce a complete RCM + Work Program.

name: Track 2: Evidence Collection & Extraction
mission: Build and test evidence extraction pipelines for 4 different evidence types.

name: Track 3: Compliance & Regulatory Assessment
mission: Run framework-specific compliance assessments against synthetic data. Produce gap reports with regulatory citations.

name: Track 4: Reporting & Visualization
mission: Convert raw findings from Tracks 1-3 into polished audit reports and visual dashboards.

name: Track 5: AI Governance & Quality Assurance
mission: Be the second pair of eyes for every other track. Test agents for security, validate findings for accuracy.
